name: Spicy Orange Ginger and Lemon Chicken Breast
recipeIngredient: 7 oz Boned and skinned chicken breast halves
2 small Garlic cloves, peeled and sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove any rind pieces from the orange and lemon using a vegetable peeler.
Roughly chop the peel strips.
2. Heat a sauté pan or skillet large enough to hold the chicken pieces.
3. Spray with olive oil spray and sear the chicken on both sides until lightly browned.
4. In a measuring cup, combine all sauce ingredients (apple juice, water, spices, ginger, garlic, etc.).
5. Pour the sauce into the hot pan and let it boil briefly to cook the thickener.
6. Reduce heat to low, cover tightly, and gently simmer for 15 minutes.
7. Serve with the cooking juices. Add more apple juice or water if the sauce loses moisture.
Menu:
The sauce is spicy, biting, and sweet, similar to some versions of Pad Thai. Serve with noodles, angel hair spaghetti, or hot steamed white rice (long or medium grain). A dark green vegetable or medley is also a good choice.
Variation:
Use dark meat such as thigh with attached leg, remove skin, sear, add sauce, and simmer until done for about 35-40 minutes total. Each serving contains approximately 225 calories and 7.6 grams of fat.
